deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this scraper? This action cannot be undone.

editor.additionalUrlsHint: Use this for scraping unrelated pages (e.g., different products). These URLs are scraped in addition to the base URL and any paginated pages.
editor.additionalUrlsNote: Optional. Add extra URLs to scrape alongside the main URL.
editor.author: Author
editor.autoDetectHint: Enter the reviews page URL and click Auto-detect to find CSS selectors automatically
editor.jsonLdDescription: This scraper uses structured data (Schema.org) embedded in the page. No CSS selectors needed.
editor.paginationHint: Automatically scrapes multiple pages by appending ?page=2, ?page=3, etc. to the base URL.
editor.selectorsAutoDetected: These selectors were auto-detected. Adjust if needed.
editor.selectorsDefault: These selectors were set to defaults. Adjust if needed.

empty.description: Create a scraper to start collecting feedback from websites
empty.title: No scrapers configured

jsonUpload.dropHint: Drop a JSON file here or click to browse
jsonUpload.fieldId: unique identifier from your source data (review ID, ticket number). Critical for deduplication — same id = skipped on re-import.
jsonUpload.fieldSource: where the feedback came from (e.g. "trustpilot", "zendesk"). Keep consistent across imports from the same origin.
jsonUpload.fieldText: the feedback content. Keep the original text as-is.
jsonUpload.fieldTimestamp: ISO 8601 UTC (e.g. 2026-03-20T14:30:00Z). When the feedback was originally created.
jsonUpload.optionalFields: Optional: rating (1-5), title, user_id, url, metadata (flat key-value).
jsonUpload.pipelineNote: Items are now being processed through the pipeline. They'll appear on the dashboard shortly.
jsonUpload.templateNote: The template file includes full instructions and LLM-ready documentation.
jsonUpload.title: JSON Upload

manualImport.enterBothFields: Please enter both URL and review text
manualImport.noReviewsDescription: The pasted text didn't contain recognizable reviews. You can add reviews manually below.
manualImport.parsingDescription: This may take 30-60 seconds for large pastes
manualImport.pasteReviewsPlaceholder: Paste the reviews you copied from the website here...
manualImport.title: Manual Import

pluginConfig.scheduleDescription: Run this source on its configured schedule

subtitle: Configure web scrapers and app review sources to collect feedback

templateSelector.jsonUploadDescription: Upload a JSON file with structured feedback data. Download a template to get started.
templateSelector.manualImportDescription: Paste reviews from any website and import them with AI parsing.
templateSelector.title: Add Data Source
